{{Quote|Their leader was a giant of a man… who wielded a lightsaber.|[[Jon (farmer)|Jon]], about Sherruk|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Sherruk''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Rally Master]] who fought in the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. He was [[Confrontation on Dantooine|killed]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] by the [[Amnesia/Legends|amnesiac]] [[Padawan|Jedi Padawan]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] at [[Jon (farmer)|Jon's]] request.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I will add your head to those of the other Jedi I have killed, and take yet another lightsaber for my own.|Sherruk to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
Following the end of the war, he led a group of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] and [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] bandits (including [[Reeza]] and [[Jarg (Mandalorian)|Jarg]]) to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], where they terrorized and extorted the local settlers. However, his group of bandits was too small to pose a threat to the [[Jedi Enclave]] or any other well-organized defense. Future [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Canderous Ordo]] was disgusted by him, his followers, and other Mandalorians like him, saying that they were taking scraps when they should be taking [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].

It was rumored he received support from the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]; this would make sense as he [[Death/Legends|killed]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and made the locals distrustful of their supposed protectors. As a [[Jedi hunter/Legends|Jedi hunter]], Sherruk enjoyed eliminating Jedi and taking their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] as trophies. He was known to have killed at least two Jedi; one with a [[Color/Legends|red]] lightsaber and one with a blue lightsaber.

In [[3956 BBY]]<ref name="Death date" />, Sherruk and his companions were [[Confrontation on Dantooine|killed]] by a reformed [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], though the former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] did not find it easy, as Sherruk proved to be a very skilled fighter.

==Personality and traits==
Sherruk was described as a "giant man who wielded a lightsaber" by [[Jon (farmer)|Jon]]. Sherruk wore [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Neo-Crusader armor|Mandalorian Neo Crusader Armor]]. Personality wise, Sherruk was a bit sadistic and took great pleasure in killing Jedi and collecting their lightsabers as trophies. He was also confident in his combat abilities and believed that he could kill Revan and take his lightsaber.

==Behind the scenes==
His name is spelled as both Sherruk and '''Sheruk''' in the game. Sherruk is found in the southern end of the Grove after all other Mandalorians and Duros warriors on Dantooine are eliminated, excluding the ones accompanying him. Despite being said by Jon to have wielded a lightsaber in combat, Sherruk fights Revan with two [[Vibrosword/Legends|vibroswords]].
